DP.460.0000:
I had a dream!
It was a wonderful dream!\f
I dreamt that a Trainer would bring
me a giant REMORAID!
DP.460.0001:
I had a dream!
It was a wonderful dream!\f
I dreamt that a Trainer would bring
me a giant REMORAID!\f
Oh, my gosh!
That dream was no dream!\f
H-how big of a REMORAID did you
bring me?!
DP.460.0002:
[0134,0000].[0132,0001] inches...
This REMORAID is [0134,0000].[0132,0001] inches...\f
...I think you did better than in
my dream!\f
I’d like you to have this.\f
DP.460.0003:
Thank you!
I really enjoyed this.\f
I think I’ll dream of an even bigger
REMORAID tonight.
DP.460.0004:
[0134,0000].[0132,0001] inches...
Am I experiencing deja vu?\r
I distinctly remember this size...
DP.460.0005:
This REMORAID was [0134,0000].[0132,0001] inches.\f
I know a genius who brought me
a REMORAID that was [0134,0002].[0132,0003] inches...
DP.460.0006:
Wha...
What do you think you’re showing me?\f
Did you even listen to what I had
to say?
DP.460.0007:
Your Bag’s jammed full...
I can’t give you this...
DP.460.0008:
Oh, what? Why would you deny me
the chance to measure your REMORAID?
